articles.headline: World Cup final squads ranked: Of all 48 national teams, who can win this summer?

keyEvents.text: Goal!  Curaçao 1, Barbados 0. Rangelo Janga (Curaçao) right footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Kenji Gorré.
Substitution, Curaçao. Jearl Margaritha replaces Xander Severina.
Substitution, Curaçao. Kevin Felida replaces Brandley Kuwas.
Juninho Bacuna (Curaçao) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Sherel Floranus (Curaçao) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Ackeel Applewhaite (Barbados) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Curaçao 2, Barbados 0. Rangelo Janga (Curaçao) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal.
Substitution, Barbados. Jaron Oughterson replaces Hadan Holligan.
Substitution, Barbados. Nadre Butcher replaces Rommel Bynoe.
Substitution, Barbados. Ricardio Morris replaces Nicoli Brathwaite because of an injury.
Substitution, Barbados. Devonte Richards replaces Tajio James.
Substitution, Curaçao. Rayvien Rosario replaces Juninho Bacuna.
Substitution, Curaçao. Cuco Martina replaces Sherel Floranus.
Goal!  Curaçao 3, Barbados 0. Rangelo Janga (Curaçao) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the high centre of the goal.
Substitution, Barbados. Ethan Taylor replaces Ackeel Applewhaite.
Substitution, Curaçao. Gervane Kastaneer replaces Rangelo Janga.
Goal!  Curaçao 3, Barbados 1. Niall Reid-Stephen (Barbados) converts the penalty with a left footed shot to the bottom left corner.

Goal!  Curaçao 4, Barbados 1. Gervane Kastaneer (Curaçao) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Rayvien Rosario with a through ball   following a fast break.
